thesis: MORNING window (11:00-ET slot, generated 2026-07-22T14:48:22Z / ~10:48 ET Wednesday 7/22) — the next-session plan on the latest live tick. NOTE the deterministic snapshot self-labels window='pre-market' and marketClosed=false, so these values are a live intraday/pre-market tick for 7/22, NOT a confirmed settled 7/22 daily close; snapshot.nextSessionDate has rolled to 7/22, so the plan is authored for that date. STRUCTURE FIRST: the extended tech-led structural bull is still DIGESTING near all-time highs and the index/leadership split PERSISTS — SPY holds its 50-day reclaim but softer, while the leadership breadth is still NOT repaired and MSFT deteriorated further. What holds: SPY 747.31 is still bull-stacked and above its 50-day (+0.44% over ~744.0, easing from +0.6% at the prior after-hours read) and sits -1.36% off the ATH (~757.6) with VIX essentially flat and low at 17.11 (+0.06 vs the 17.05 prior read). What is UNWON / DETERIORATING: QQQ 706.62 slipped FURTHER below its 50-day (now -1.69% under ~718.8, from -1.37%) and stays TANGLED — the reclaim is not just unwon, it is slipping (mom5 -1.55); MSFT 388.72 FOLLOWED THROUGH lower, now -2.86% below its 50-day (~400.2, from -0.73%) — the failed reclaim confirmed to the downside, still bear-stacked and -10.86% below its 200-day. Persistence by distinct COMPLETED daily bars: the prior run confirmed 7 (7/09->7/10->7/13->7/14->7/15->7/16->7/17); the snapshot has since ROLLED its nextSessionDate to 7/22, implying 7/20 and 7/21 completed and settled — extending the theme to ~9 distinct completed daily bars (7/09->7/21) as an INFERRED extension from the date roll (Tier-A does not separately enumerate the settled bars past 7/17 this run); today 7/22 is a live intraday tick and is NOT counted, and intraday reruns are not counted. FRAME: SPMO 150.14 bull-stacked and FIRMING (sitting on its 50-day, ma50Dist -0.19, mom5 turned +0.09) / VGT 115.32 tangled (mom5 -1.01), both still soft on 21-day. ROTATION shifted vs the prior run and is confirmed on this run's live RRG (sector read asOf 2026-07-22T14:48:22Z): the model now reads 'Rotate toward XLE as XLV weakens' — XLE Leading (rsRatio 100.87>100, accel +1.23, rsMom 102.21 board-best, rotation into, +15.42% over its 200-day) with commodities confirming underneath (real-assets 13:30Z: PDBC 70 Uptrend leads, commodity breadth 75); XLK has SOFTENED to Basing up (rsMom 99.73<100, accel +0.46) — no longer the clean 'into' tech name it was, so energy is now the designated rotation. XLV Weakening (accel -2.57, out), XLI Weakening (out), the defensive/rate bid mixed (XLRE Peaking out, XLP/XLY Lagging). Semis re-rated to Leading (SOXX rsMom 100.06, accel +1.03) but internals are THINNER (3/12 above their 50-day, 0/12 up-momentum, rsMom1m -15.84). TACTICAL, last: monthly OPEX (7/17) is RESOLVED and dealer gamma has RESET — prior pin/wall/magnet values are DEAD; fresh post-OPEX gamma walls, VIX9D/VIX3M term structure and the live 7/29 FedWatch path are NOT in this run and MUST be re-pulled before sizing off positioning, vol term structure or the Fed. PLAN: HOLD the bull-stack and do NOT chase index beta up here into ATH resistance while QQQ is tangled and slipping below its 50-day (SPY's held reclaim needs QQQ to confirm the broadening); ROTATE toward the confirmed Leading XLE over weakening XLV as XLK's RS softens; TRIM stretched, internally-thinner semis into any strength; HOLD (don't chase) MSFT after it followed through below its 50-day into the 7/29 capex guide; carry a small defined-risk hedge toward the underpriced 7/29 hike tail — flat-and-low VIX keeps it cheap to carry, not less necessary — after re-verifying the live path; stay OUT of precious-metal havens (GLD 18 firming but no clean bid / SLV 0).
